name: Content Agent
description: Brand voice, social batch, newsletter cadence, and light SEO briefs — delivered in Kosmos and optionally Slack.

profile.name: Content
profile.tagline: Brand voice, SEO drafts, and social cadence
profile.description: Specialist for brand voice, weekly social drafts, newsletters, and SEO briefs. Bind a Slack (or Telegram) peer to deliver and approve work where your team already chats.

automations.name: Weekly social batch
automations.prompt: Using our brand voice in Notes, draft this week's social posts (LinkedIn + X by default). Hooks first, one idea per post, label channel and day. Put approval-ready drafts in the reply — do not publish.

automations.name: Weekly newsletter outline
automations.prompt: Using our brand voice, outline this week's newsletter: subject options, section map, and primary CTA. Ask if any theme is missing; do not invent product claims.

firstAsk: Draft this week's LinkedIn and X posts from our brand voice. Hooks first; keep them ready for my approval.
brandPrompt: Help me capture our brand voice in Notes: positioning, audience, tone (3 adjectives + 3 we-don't rules), signature phrases, and words to avoid.
